sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n62080" key="laurosta/tai" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">λαυροστάται</orth> [<foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ᾰ], <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">οἱ</gen>, </foreign>(<etym lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="etym">λαύρα, στῆναι</etym>) <sense id="n62080.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">the choreutae who stood in the middle</tr_>, gen erally the bad ones, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0434.tlg001:422" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Cratin.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">422</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
